name: rlv-code
title: RL Ventures · Code
description: Engineering hub for RL Ventures LLC — single-file static HTML index of active code projects, principles, and stack.
author: Howell
architecture: Single-file static HTML (index.html). IBM Plex Mono + warm accent palette mirroring rlv-lol. No build step.
deployment: pending — default choice: GitHub Pages at code.rlv.lol via CNAME file
design_decisions: Single-file HTML — match rlv-lol pattern, no build pipeline
Subdomain code.rlv.lol chosen over new registration (reversible, zero cost)
Hardcoded live metrics (12,880 glazes, 1302.34 °C, 99 KG entities) — re-verify before each deploy
gotchas: DNS/hosting for rlv.lol not yet confirmed — scaffold assumes subdomain will be added to existing zone
No deploy script shipped yet — pick Porkbun FTP vs GitHub Pages when hosting decided
last_known_state: scaffolded · awaiting hosting decision + git init

history.note: Initial scaffold by Claude-Howell (CH-260423-4). index.html + README + CNAME + project.json + .gitignore.

notes: Companion to rlv-lol (LLC hub). This one is the code-facing index. Public, no gated dashboard.
